body:
## Approved Implementation Plan

### Architecture Decisions
- **ES Modules → CommonJS**: All formatters converted to CommonJS for server-side `require()` loading
- **Ref Storage Hybrid**: Server generates refs during formatting, sends mappings back to extension via WebSocket `store_refs` message. Extension stores in existing `accessibility-storage.js`. Click/scroll handlers unchanged.

### Sub-tasks

| # | Description | Complexity | Dependencies |
|---|-------------|------------|--------------|
| 1 | Create formatter directory, migrate & convert formatters to CommonJS | standard | none |
| 2 | Server-side formatter manager (loading, execution, reload) | standard | 1 |
| 3 | Update extension to send raw nodes (remove formatting) | standard | none |
| 4 | Update MCP handler for server-side formatting + ref distribution | complex | 1, 2, 3 |
| 5 | GitHub auto-update system (formatter-updater.js) | standard | 2 |
| 6 | Extension UI -- check for updates button | light | 5 |
| 7 | Cleanup old formatter files and verify end-to-end | light | 3, 4, 5, 6 |

### Parallel Execution
- Sub-tasks 1 and 3 run in parallel
- Sub-task 5 can overlap with sub-task 4
- Critical path: 1 → 2 → 4 → 7
